nasb.text: and it shall be for him and his descendants after him, a covenant of a perpetual priesthood, because he was jealous for his God and made atonement for the sons of Israel.’ ”

esv.text: and it shall be to him and to his descendants after him the covenant of a perpetual priesthood, because he was jealous for his God and made atonement for the people of Israel.’”

cnv.text: 要給他和他的後裔作為永遠擔當祭司職分的約，因為他為他的　神有忌邪的心，為以色列人贖罪。’”

ccb.text: 使他和他的后代凭此约可以永远做祭司，因为他为我除掉了不贞之人，为以色列人赎了罪。”
